observed_symptoms: lsof shows multiple CLOSE_WAIT sockets on backend process

raw_signals.systemctl_restart: stop-sigterm timeout, process killed by SIGKILL before clean restart
raw_signals.journal_hint: service answered /api/version and one /api/system/service-conflicts, then smoke calls time out

confirmed_root_cause: Backend responsiveness is unstable under smoke load (endpoint timeouts despite active service/listener).
